title: Founder proof: bounded-context control surface
workflow: Context preparation → scoped work item → verification → sanitized report
summary: Founder-operated aggregate telemetry, published as a public-safe proof fixture. This is not a client deployment, testimonial, or performance guarantee.

before.label: Manual interventions
before.source: Not captured in the aggregate telemetry rollup.

assisted.label: Time to first useful change
assisted.source: No task-level timestamp pair was approved for this aggregate proof.

assisted.label: Changed files
assisted.source: Public proof deliberately publishes categories rather than source file names.

verification.label: Aggregate telemetry consistency
verification.evidence: The recorded aggregate reports 12 verified runs and 17 context-preflight runs; only those aggregates are published.

verification.label: Public proof contract
verification.evidence: Schema, forbidden-content, and evidence requirements are checked in this repository's QA gate.

limitations: No matched before/after task baseline is available, so no improvement percentage is claimed.
This founder proof is not a customer result and carries no customer identity, source code, prompt, response, path, or runtime log.
Task duration, manual interventions, and per-task token comparison remain unavailable until an owner-approved cohort workflow records them.
shareText: A founder proof of bounded context, scoped execution, verification, and a sanitized report — with unavailable metrics left unavailable.
